title: Time Warp Attack
description: Time warp attacks manipulate block timestamps across difficulty periods so miners can suppress or lower future difficulty despite faster block production. The exploit sits at the intersection of retarget math and Bitcoin's consensus limits on miner-controlled time.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech Topic: Time Warp
resources.notes: Canonical overview of the attack, why it matters, and the current mitigation discussion.

resources.title: BIP 54: Consensus Cleanup
resources.notes: Specification and motivation for fixing the time warp bug as part of the consensus cleanup bundle.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Broad technical reference for the mining, block-header, and consensus mechanics that make the exploit legible.
